sentences.arabic: يُعْتَبَرُ الْمَشْيُ رِيَاضَةً بَسِيطَةً وَمُفِيدَةً لِلْجِسْمِ.
sentences.translation: Hodanje se smatra jednostavnim i korisnim sportom za tijelo.
sentences.translationEn: Walking is considered a simple and beneficial sport for the body.

sentences.arabic: أَمْشِي لِمُدَّةِ ثَلَاثِينَ دَقِيقَةً فِي الْحَدِيقَةِ كُلَّ صَبَاحٍ.
sentences.translation: Šetam trideset minuta u parku svakog jutra.
sentences.translationEn: I walk for thirty minutes in the park every morning.

sentences.arabic: تُسَاعِدُنِي هَذِهِ الْعَادَةُ عَلَى الشُّعُورِ بِالنَّشَاطِ طَوَالَ الْيَوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Ova navika mi pomaže da se osjećam aktivno tokom cijelog dana.
sentences.translationEn: This habit helps me feel energetic throughout the day.
